mapper.sql: inventory_property_id, inventory_type_code, customer_no, ppl, project_code, group_customer_no, sales_info_no, exp_date, version, delflag, cre_time, creator, modify_time, modifier, uid
mapper.select:
select
distinct
from dbo.ops_inventory_property
order by ${orderByClause}
mapper.insert: insert into dbo.ops_inventory_property (inventory_property_id, inventory_type_code, customer_no, ppl, project_code, group_customer_no, sales_info_no, exp_date, version, delflag, cre_time, creator, modify_time, modifier, uid) values (#{inventoryPropertyId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{inventoryTypeCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{customerNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{ppl,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{projectCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{groupCustomerNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{salesInfoNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{expDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{version,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{delflag,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{creTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{creator,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{modifyTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{modifier,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{uid,jdbcType=VARCHAR})

insert into dbo.ops_inventory_property
inventory_property_id,
inventory_type_code,
customer_no,
ppl,
project_code,
group_customer_no,
sales_info_no,
exp_date,
version,
delflag,
cre_time,
creator,
modify_time,
modifier,
uid,

#{inventoryTypeCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},

mapper.update:
update dbo.ops_inventory_property
inventory_property_id = #{record.inventoryPropertyId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
inventory_type_code = #{record.inventoryTypeCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
customer_no = #{record.customerNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ppl = #{record.ppl,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
project_code = #{record.projectCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
group_customer_no = #{record.groupCustomerNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
sales_info_no = #{record.salesInfoNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
exp_date = #{record.expDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
version = #{record.version,jdbcType=BIGINT},
delflag = #{record.delflag,jdbcType=INTEGER},
cre_time = #{record.creTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
creator = #{record.creator,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
modify_time = #{record.modifyTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
modifier = #{record.modifier,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
uid = #{record.uid,jdbcType=VARCHAR},

update dbo.ops_inventory_property set inventory_property_id = #{record.inventoryPropertyId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, inventory_type_code = #{record.inventoryTypeCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, customer_no = #{record.customerNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ppl = #{record.ppl,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, project_code = #{record.projectCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, group_customer_no = #{record.groupCustomerNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, sales_info_no = #{record.salesInfoNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, exp_date = #{record.expDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, version = #{record.version,jdbcType=BIGINT}, delflag = #{record.delflag,jdbcType=INTEGER}, cre_time = #{record.creTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, creator = #{record.creator,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, modify_time = #{record.modifyTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, modifier = #{record.modifier,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, uid = #{record.uid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}

update dbo.ops_inventory_property
inventory_type_code = #{inventoryTypeCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
customer_no = #{customerNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ppl = #{ppl,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
project_code = #{projectCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
group_customer_no = #{groupCustomerNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
sales_info_no = #{salesInfoNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
exp_date = #{expDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
version = #{version,jdbcType=BIGINT},
delflag = #{delflag,jdbcType=INTEGER},
cre_time = #{creTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
creator = #{creator,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
modify_time = #{modifyTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
modifier = #{modifier,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
uid = #{uid,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
where inventory_property_id = #{inventoryPropertyId,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update dbo.ops_inventory_property set inventory_type_code = #{inventoryTypeCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, customer_no = #{customerNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ppl = #{ppl,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, project_code = #{projectCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, group_customer_no = #{groupCustomerNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, sales_info_no = #{salesInfoNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, exp_date = #{expDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, version = #{version,jdbcType=BIGINT}, delflag = #{delflag,jdbcType=INTEGER}, cre_time = #{creTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, creator = #{creator,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, modify_time = #{modifyTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, modifier = #{modifier,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, uid = #{uid,jdbcType=VARCHAR} where inventory_property_id = #{inventoryPropertyId,jdbcType=BIGINT}
